# Click,  click,💲

## Metadata
- **From:** "Jolissa @ MonsterInsights" <support@monsterinsights.com>
- **Date:** 2024-10-21 06:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 238

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

What are your website visitors clicking on?

If you don’t know, you’re missing out on important data that
could help you grow.

Are visitors:

* Clicking to submit your forms?
* Clicking on a call-to-action button you have?
* Clicking your add to cart button?
* Clicking the play button on your videos?

Without setting up click tracking, it’s pretty hard to figure
out!

That’s why we’ve added so many click tracking capabilities to
MonsterInsights. We’ve worked really hard to make something super
easy that would normally be too difficult for many website owners
to tackle.

With MonsterInsights, you’re already tracking download clicks,
affiliate link clicks, click-to-call clicks, and outbound link
clicks. MonsterInsights Pro 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9._dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kcmlwJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPWxpdGUtb25ib2FyZGluZyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1jbGlja190cmFja2luZyZfX3M9amM0aGF1dzVxYjRnYnBlMzQ1NWQifQ.MNxzoTvGXnIgrb4Wle98BLj0BAN5kgk0JknIMvPAjpI )
 adds form submit clicks, add-to-cart clicks, play/pause button
clicks, and more.

For a full picture of all the clicks you can track with
MonsterInsights, check out:

👉 How to Track Link Clicks in Google Analytics 4 and WordPress 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..KtfRcwAHmGvd_qKKrXkznX0uvcZJoWLYPpyNnki0LDQ )
 👈

Need help setting up your link click tracking? Just respond to
this email.

Until next time,

Jolissa Skow
MonsterInsights Product Educator
